intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把“Old Delhi markets -> square rest -> snake charmer -> two baskets -> coin-covered pipe -> first glimpse -> followed movements -> jazz and pop -> not very musical”的旅行观察链读顺。注意 had had 不要慌，As、As soon as、When 后面要分好意群，however 前后要有轻微转折，最后一句要读出一点好笑的发现。

sentences.text: As we had had a long walk through one of the markets of old Delhi, we stopped at a square to have a rest.
sentences.focus_zh: As 引出背景和原因；had had 两个 had 功能不同，但朗读时都清楚带过。through one of the markets of old Delhi 是长地点短语，要连成一组。

sentences.text: After a time, we noticed a snake charmer with two large baskets at the other side of the square, so we went to have a look at him.
sentences.focus_zh: After a time 后面轻停；snake charmer、two large baskets、at the other side of the square 是画面链，要读出“看见 -> 走过去看”的顺序。

sentences.text: As soon as he saw us, he picked up a long pipe which was covered with coins and opened one of the baskets.
sentences.focus_zh: As soon as 表示马上行动；picked up、covered with coins、opened one of the baskets 三个动作要读得清楚，不要把 which 从句读散。

sentences.text: When he began to play a tune, we had our first glimpse of the snake.
sentences.focus_zh: When 引出蛇出现的时刻；first glimpse 是第一次短短看见，要读出“刚看到”的感觉。

sentences.text: It rose out of the basket and began to follow the movements of the pipe.
sentences.focus_zh: rose out of the basket 是慢慢升出来；follow the movements of the pipe 是本课科学纠偏的关键，要把 movements 读清楚。

sentences.text: We were very much surprised when the snake charmer suddenly began to play jazz and modern pop songs.
sentences.focus_zh: very much surprised 读出惊讶但不要夸张；suddenly began to play 后面接 jazz and modern pop songs，说明音乐风格变了。

sentences.text: The snake, however, continued to 'dance' slowly.
sentences.focus_zh: however 前后要有轻微停顿，读出转折；continued to 'dance' slowly 要读得慢一点，因为蛇的动作没有跟着音乐风格改变。

sentences.text: It obviously could not tell the difference between Indian music and jazz!
sentences.focus_zh: obviously 是显然；tell the difference between A and B 是分辨两者区别。最后要有一点 amused tone，因为标题笑点在这里落下。
